data.name: PleaseStandbyIndexRecreating
data.value: The index is recreating. Please wait a few minutes before you reload the page.

data.name: AddressSelectCompany
data.value: To insert address information you must select a company first.

data.name: AddAddressToCompany
data.value: Add an address to the company.

data.name: NoCausingItemPreviousSerialNoReasonKey
data.value: No causing item previous serial no. reason

data.name: NoCausingItemSerialNoReasonKey
data.value: No causing item serial no. reason

data.name: ServiceProvisionPerTimeSpanUnitKey
data.value: Service provision per timespan unit key

data.name: SparePartsBudgetInvoiceTypeKey
data.value: Spare parts budget invoice type key

data.name: SparePartsPerTimeSpanUnitKey
data.value: Spare parts per timespan unit key

data.name: UnassignUsers
data.value: There are some users assigned to this role: {0}. Please unassign them first then delete the role afterwards.

data.name: UnassignUsersFromGroup
data.value: There are some users assigned to this group: {0}. Please unassign them first then delete the group afterwards.

data.name: RuleViolation.NotValidLanguageKey
data.value: Key is not a valid language key

data.name: NoRecordFoundBackgroundServices
data.value: No records were found for Background Services

data.name: RuleViolation.EditAllowed
data.value: No permission to edit this user

data.name: SubscribedExplanation
data.value: You will be notified of any change related to this entity.

data.name: RemoveDeviceConfirmationText
data.value: To remove a device, you need to validate your identity.

data.name: Error_UserNotRecognized
data.value: Unfortunately we can't recognize your user. If you should have access to this system, please notify a system administrator to make the assignment.

data.name: RetryTransactionConfirmationQuestion
data.value: Are you sure you want to retry processing this transaction?

data.name: PasswordChangeRequired
data.value: User must change password at next login

data.name: AsAnExcelFileMsg
data.comment: Message of the link that creates an excel file of the all people on the system.

data.name: AsAVCardFileMsg
data.comment: Message of the link that creates .zip file which holds the all people's vCards in it.

data.name: AtMsg
data.comment: A connector word between two sentences.

data.name: BackTitle
data.comment: Title of the back button of the paging control.

data.name: CancelTitle
data.comment: Title of the link that cancels the action.

data.name: City
data.comment: Title of the label that displays the city textbox next to it.

data.name: CompaniesTitle
data.comment: Title of the link that filters the results to companies only.

data.name: CompanyTitle
data.comment: Title of the label that shows the company text.

data.name: ContactsTitle
data.comment: Title of the tab menu item that shows all contacts.

data.name: Country
data.comment: Title of the label that displays the country textbox next to it.

data.name: DetailsTitle
data.comment: Title of the page that shows details of the chosen contact.

data.name: EmailTitle
data.comment: Title of the label that displays the E-mail textbox next to it.

data.name: ExportTitle
data.comment: Title of the label that displays the export option below.

data.name: FirstName
data.comment: Title of the label that displays the first name textbox next to it.

data.name: Firstname
data.comment: Title of the label that displays the first name textbox next to it.

data.name: ForwardTitle
data.comment: Title of the forward button of the paging control.

data.name: HideTitle
data.comment: Title of the link that hides the relevant form from user.

data.name: InfluenceTitle
data.comment: Title of the label that displays the influence of the person textboxt.

data.name: JobTitle
data.comment: Title of the label that displays the job textbox next to it.

data.name: MimaTitle
data.comment: Title of the label that displays the MIMA of the person textboxt.

data.name: OrMsg
data.comment: A connector word between two sentences.

data.name: PeopleTitle
data.comment: Title of the link that filters the results to people only.

data.name: SalutationTitle
data.comment: Title of the label that displays the title of the person textbox next to it.

data.name: SaveTitle
data.comment: Title of the link that saves the action.

data.name: AdvancedSearch
data.comment: Message of the link that opens new search criteria options.

data.name: Surname
data.comment: Title of the label that displays the surname textbox next to it.

data.name: TrainingTitle
data.comment: Title of the label that displays the training of the person textboxt.

data.name: ViewTitle
data.comment: Title of the label that shows the view options to the user.

data.name: AddressesTitle
data.comment: Title of the label that shows the addresses below.

data.name: Phones
data.comment: Title of the label that shows the phones below.

data.name: Street
data.comment: Title of the label that shows the street of the address.

data.name: WebSiteTitle
data.comment: Title of the label that displays the web sites of the contact.

data.name: Find
data.comment: Title of the button that retrieves the matched results according to a given criteria.

data.name: OwnCompanyTitle
data.comment: Title of the checkbox that represents the company ownership of the person.

data.name: SearchTextTitle
data.comment: Title of the label that displays the search text textbox next to it.

data.name: T_AddNew
data.comment: Title of the link that lets user to add new fields.

data.name: FaxTitle
data.comment: Title of the label that displays the faxes of the contact.

data.name: DeleteTitle
data.comment: Title of the link that deletes the row next to it.

data.name: AddressTitle
data.comment: Title of the label that displays the address next to it.

data.name: ResearchTitle
data.comment: Title of the checkbox that displays the is research option next to it.

data.name: EditTitle
data.comment: Title of the link that redirects user to the edit page of the selected content.

data.name: MapTitle
data.comment: Title of the link that redirects user to the map of the address.

data.name: Position
data.comment: Title of the label that displays the position of the person dropdown next to it.

data.name: AdministrationTitle
data.comment: Title of the tab menu item that shows administration.

data.name: ImportFromDBTitle
data.comment: Title of the Import Database Control

data.name: ImportTable
data.comment: Title of the Import Table Button

data.name: CountOfImportedObjects
data.comment: Title of the label Count of successfully imported objects

data.name: ListTitle
data.comment: Title of the Link that display List next to it

data.name: ImportLUTable
data.comment: Title of the Import Look-up Table Button

data.name: ImportFromZTTitle
data.comment: Title of the Import Look-up Control

data.name: MessageTitle
data.comment: Title of the label that displays Message next to it

data.value: Please provide at least a little bit of text

data.name: SendTitle
data.comment: Title of the label that displays send on it

data.comment: Message that is displayed if no records where found.

data.name: M_ResultCount
data.comment: Message that displays the Result Count

data.name: M_SearchForContacts
data.comment: Message that asks the user to input his search string

data.value: Task has been marked as done.

data.value: Do you really want to delete this company ?

data.value: Do you really want to delete this person ?

data.name: L_LocalizationManager
data.comment: Title of the Localization Manager in the Sidebar

data.comment: Title of the UI for editing the localization

data.name: M_DeleteEntry
data.value: Do you really want to delete this entry?

data.name: DeleteAddressConfirmationMessage
data.value: Do you really want to delete the address ?

data.name: EditCategoriesIntroduction
data.value: Add new categories or edit existing ones.

data.name: TasksIcalHint
data.value: {0} to see your tasks on your Microsoft Outlook 2007, Apple iCal, Mozilla Calendar or other program that supports the iCalendar format.

data.name: NewLookupExplanation
data.value: Please specify a new unique {0} key for the lookup you want to create. You can add translations after saving the key.

data.name: MaintenanceContact
data.value: Person in charge at the customer

data.name: This information is visible for groups: {0}.
data.value: This information is visible for groups: {0}.

data.name: This information is visible for users: {0}.
data.value: This information is visible for users: {0}.

data.name: This information is private for you.
data.value: This information is private for you.

data.name: InformationVisibleForFollowingUser
data.value: This information is visible for the user.

data.name: InformationVisibleForFollowingUsers
data.value: This information is visible for the users.

data.name: InformationVisibleForFollowingUserGroup
data.value: This information is visible for the user group.

data.name: InformationVisibleForFollowingUserGroups
data.value: This information is visible for the user groups.

data.name: M_ErrorCodeExist
data.value: Given error code already exist. Data not saved.

data.name: M_ErrorCodeNull
data.value: Error code can not be null. Data not saved.

data.name: M_ChosenItemExistsAlreadyInMaterialList
data.value: Chosen item already exists in the material list.

data.name: M_ChosenItemExistsAlreadyInTimeList
data.value: Chosen item already exists in the time list.

data.name: PasswordHint
data.value: Hint: Password must be at least {0} characters long.

data.name: DuplicateEmail
data.value: A username for that E-mail address already exists.

data.name: InvalidAnswer
data.value: The password retrieval answer provided is invalid.

data.name: InvalidEmail
data.value: The E-mail address provided is invalid.

data.name: RuleViolation.InvalidEmail
data.value: The E-mail address provided is invalid.

data.name: InvalidQuestion
data.value: The password retrieval question provided is invalid.

data.name: InvalidUserName
data.value: The user name provided is invalid.

data.name: ProviderError
data.value: The authentication provider returned an error. Please verify your entry and try again. If the problem persists, please contact your system administrator.

data.name: UserRejected
data.value: The user creation request has been canceled. Please verify your entry and try again. If the problem persists, please contact your system administrator.

data.name: M_ItemAlreadyInList
data.value: Item no. is in the list already.

data.name: M_TimePostingsExist
data.value: Postings already exist for the chosen time line.

data.name: M_AddPostingsProhibited
data.value: Current order state prevents adding of additional time postings.

data.name: M_OverlappedPostingsFound
data.value: Overlapped postings are marked with red color.

data.name: SalutationLetter_Default
data.value: Please choose a salutation for letters.

data.name: M_QualityPlanExist
data.value: Given quality plan already exist. Data not saved.

data.name: M_QualityPlanNull
data.value: Quality plan key can not be null. Data not saved.

data.name: InvalidUserGroupName
data.value: The name of the user group is invalid.

data.name: MaintenanceType
data.value: Maintenance agreement - maintenance type (type of service)

data.name: ConfirmResetRole
data.value: Are you sure you'd like to reset role {0}? Custom changes will be lost.

data.name: TasksSubscribeToIcalFeed
data.value: Subscribe to your iCalendar task feed.

data.name: AccessDenied
data.value: You've been denied access to this page.

data.name: Error_Forbidden
data.value: You are not allowed to view this page.

data.name: AddressType_Default
data.value: Please choose a type for the address ...

data.name: BusinessTitleHint
data.value: e. g. CEO, leader of sales department

data.name: ContactVisibilityWarning
data.value: Take care with settings, you could easily prevent yourself or the responsible user from seeing the contact after saving your changes.

data.name: RuleViolation.AddressRequired
data.value: The person is not assigned an address.

data.name: InstallationMonitoringDataTitle
data.value: Datatypes for data coming from monitoring

data.name: MonitoringDataType
data.value: Datatypes for data coming from monitoring

data.name: ContactFileNotCSV
data.value: The contact file must be of type .csv.

data.name: ContactFileTooLarge
data.value: The contact file is too large.

data.name: M_ItemNotFound
data.value: Item not found. Please provide a valid item number.

data.name: NoDashboardInfo
data.value: The dashboard gives you an overview of the latest notes, mails and projects added to the system. You can also search for a contact, add new contacts, add tasks or view your tasks in the sidebar.

data.name: NoTasksAssignedInfo
data.value: You can not see any assigned tasks yet, but once you assign a new task to one of your co-workers the list will display it.

data.name: NoTasksCompletedForOtherUserInfo
data.value: You can not see any finished tasks for {0} yet, but once {0} starts completing tasks, this list will fill.

data.name: NoTasksLeftTitle
data.value: Tasks help you get things done.

data.name: NoTasksLeftInfo
data.value: Never forget to "Call Peter at 4pm" or "Send the offer to Michael tomorrow morning." You can set a task for yourself or assign one to someone else. The system will even send an E-mail so you don't forget.

data.name: NoTasksCompletedTitle
data.value: You have not completed any tasks yet.

data.name: NoTasksCompletedInfo
data.value: This list is currently empty, but once you start completing tasks, it will fill.

data.name: Error_NotFound
data.value: You can use the navigation or the search box to find what you were looking for.

data.name: NoBackgroundInformation
data.value: Click here to add background information for {0}.

data.name: NoNoteInfo
data.value: You might enter a note about a call, or a meeting, or a conversation you just had with this person. Notes are great for keeping a history of your interactions or communications with someone.

data.name: NoNotesInfo
data.value: What is a note? You might enter a note about a call, or a meeting, or a conversation you just had with this person. Notes are great for keeping a history of your interactions or communications with someone.

data.name: NoTasksFinishedInfo
data.value: You can not see any finished tasks yet, but once you start completing tasks this list will fill.

data.name: PersonalInfoDesc
data.value: Change your name, photo, E-mail address, username or password.

data.name: TasksCompleteAssignedConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to complete this assigned task?

data.name: NoActiveBravos
data.value: No active BRAVOs found for this contact.

data.name: NoBranches
data.value: No branches were set for this company.

data.name: NoInactiveBravos
data.value: No inactive BRAVOs found for this contact.

data.name: M_WaitForTransferJob
data.value: Wait until the transfer job did it's work.

data.name: M_UnplanTechniciansOrWaitForOfflineChange
data.value: Unplan technicians or wait until technicians set the status offline.

data.name: M_KeyAlreadyExist
data.value: Key already exists in the table.

data.name: AddTaskToNoteQuestion
data.value: Do you want to add a task to this note?

data.name: AddAFollowUpTask
data.value: Add a follow-up task for this note.

data.name: ChecklistNotFullyFilled
data.value: Checklist has not been fully filled.

data.name: PasswordResetLinkSent
data.value: If we know this e-mail address, we have sent a link to reset the password to it.

data.name: ExportedContactsSentByMail
data.value: The .csv-file with the exported contacts is sent to your E-mail address.

data.name: NoContactsFromCompany
data.value: There are no contacts associated with this company.

data.name: InvalidCategoryValue
data.value: The value you entered is invalid.

data.name: AddTagToSeachCriteria
data.value: Add a new tag to search criteria.

data.name: CompanyMustHaveAddressToAddPerson
data.value: The company must have at least one address to be able to add a contact person.

data.name: M_ErrorCodeIsNotNumber
data.value: The code of an error code must be a number. Data not saved.

data.name: PleaseAddNoteText
data.value: Please enter some text for your note.

data.name: AskDeleteErrorCode
data.value: Are you sure you'd like to delete this error code?

data.name: ListOfNotesHeaderNotificationContact
data.value: List of notes to the notification

data.name: InvalidFax
data.value: The fax number provided is invalid.

data.name: InvalidPhone
data.value: The phone number provided is invalid.

data.name: ConfirmDeleteAddress
data.value: Do you really want to delete this address?

data.name: DeleteOfflineUserDenied
data.value: Chosen user is referenced {0} times. Delete denied.

data.name: M_CustomerContactNotFound
data.value: Please fill in valid customer. Park not saved.

data.name: NoMatchingNotes
data.value: No notes found matching the query!

data.name: Notesearchdescription
data.value: To search for notes, type in a query in the upper textbox.

data.name: SearchExplanation
data.value: Search the list via the criteria.

data.name: M_CanNotDeleteInstallationPos
data.value: {Installation} Position can not be deleted, position itself or some of its children are already referenced.

data.name: Wildcarddescription2
data.value: * , which matches any character sequence (including the empty one), e. g.: "example*" or "e*ample"

data.name: Wildcarddescription3
data.value: ? , which matches any single character, e. g.: "example?" or "e?ample"

data.name: DeleteNoteConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this note?

data.name: EntityWithoutActivityDays
data.value: {0} without activity in the last {1} days

data.name: ExportInfo
data.value: Contacts were chosen to be exported.

data.name: ExportFormat
data.value: Choose the format as which the contacts should be exported. If you want to export less than 100 contacts a download will be started automatically . If you want to export more than 100 contacts you will get an E-mail with the contacts as attachement when the export is done. The E-mail will be send from the system. This will only take a few minutes to complete.

data.name: ExportInfo1
data.value: Contact was choosen to be exported.

data.name: ExportFormat1
data.value: Choose the format as which the contact should be exported.

data.name: ExportConfirmation
data.value: Your chosen contacts were exported successfully.

data.name: ExportContactsAsZipInfo
data.value: The common file format. This option exports every contact in a seperat vCard. We will pack all these vCards in an archive. You can dearchive these archive after you downloaded it to your computer.

data.name: ExportContactsAsVcfInfo
data.value: This option exports every contact in one vCard. Not all programs support that format, but if you're using one supporting it, we recommend this option.

data.name: ExportContactsAsCsvInfo
data.value: This format is useful if you will import your contacts f. e. in an Excel file. CSV stands for "Comma Seperated Value".

data.name: M_MaterialsExist
data.value: Materials already exist for the chosen time line.

data.name: NoDataToDisplay
data.value: There's no data for your search criteria.

data.name: NoRecordsForSearchCriteria
data.value: No records were found according to your search criteria.

data.name: NoTasksFromOtherUsers
data.value: There are no tasks from other users for this contact.

data.name: AssignedTaskCreatedSubject
data.value: {Task.ModifyUser} assigned a new task to you.

data.name: AssignedTaskModifiedSubject
data.value: {Task.ModifyUser} modified a task assigned to you.

data.name: EnterLink
data.value: Enter link (press Return if you want to add another link)

data.name: NoContactsSelectedInfo
data.value: The following actions are unlocked when selecting contacts.

data.name: M_WarehouseLocationDoesntExist
data.value: Combination Warehouse/Location does not exist. Data was not saved.

data.name: ErrorService_Forbidden
data.value: You are not allowed to view this page.

data.name: ErrorService_NotFound
data.value: You can use the navigation to find what you were looking for.

data.name: FilePrepare
data.value: Your file will be prepared. Please be patient.

data.name: NoFileToExport
data.value: There are no projects for the applied filter.

data.name: ConfirmResetToken
data.value: Do you really want to reset the token for user {0}?

data.name: ConfirmResetOwnToken
data.value: Do you want to reset your token?

data.name: TokenDesc
data.value: The token is required for calls to the REST-API or subscriptions to RSS feeds.

data.name: EditCategoriesWarning
data.value: Changes to categories will affect all users. Please edit these categories only if you're sure what you're doing. In case of doubt, please contact an administrator.

data.name: SeeYourTasks
data.value: To see your tasks, open the

data.name: RuleViolation.Number
data.value: {0} has to be a whole number.

data.name: RuleViolation.EntityDoesNotExist
data.value: The requested entity does not exist

data.name: RuleViolation.IdsInUriAndContentDoNotMatch
data.value: The IDs in the URL and request body are not identical.

data.name: RuleViolation.NotAllowedToAccessEntity
data.value: You have no permission to access this entity.

data.name: RuleViolation.PostForCreatePutForUpdate
data.value: Use POST to create and PUT to update an entity.

data.name: HintMacUser
data.value: Hint for Mac user: You have to change the encoding to display the vCard correctly. First open your address book and open the options, then choose "vCard" and change the format to 2.1 and the encoding to "Westeuropean Windows Latin 1".

data.name: SocialTip
data.value: Please paste the link to the profile of the contact.

data.name: DocAddedToServiceOrder
data.value: Document "{0}" was assigned to service order {1}.

data.name: DocAddedToInstallationPos
data.value: Document "{0}" was assigned to position "{1}" in {Installation} {2}.

data.name: DocAddedToServiceOrderMaterial
data.value: Document "{0}" was assigned to material position "{1}" in service order {2}.

data.name: DocAddedToServiceOrderTime
data.value: Document "{0}" was assigned to operation position "{1}" in service order {2}.

data.name: DocRemovedFromInstallationPos
data.value: Document "{0}" was removed from position "{1}" in {Installation} {2}.

data.name: DocRemovedFromServiceOrder
data.value: Document "{0}" was removed from service order {1}.

data.name: DocRemovedFromServiceOrderMaterial
data.value: Document "{0}" was removed from material position "{1}" in service order {2}.

data.name: DocRemovedFromServiceOrderTime
data.value: Document "{0}" was removed from operation position "{1}" in service order {2}.

data.name: InstallationPosSerialInstalled
data.value: {Installation} position "{0} - {1}" with serial number {2} was installed.

data.name: InstallationPosSerialUninstalled
data.value: {Installation} position "{0} - {1}" with serial number {2} was uninstalled.

data.name: ErrorCodeHint
data.value: Enter the first characters of an error code to get some suggestions.

data.name: AdditionalContactsToInstallationTextPartTwo
data.value: . You can now allocate additional contacts (e. g. distribution partner, service company, etc.). After this allocation the {Installation} will displayed in both companies.

data.name: LoadingCategories
data.value: Categories will be loaded. Please wait for a moment.

data.name: NotAllowedToViewThisContent
data.value:
You aren't able to see this part due to the limited visibility of this contact.
Please get in touch with one of the users that is currently able to see the contact to change this situation.

data.name: FillNotePlease
data.value: Please fill the text for the note.

data.name: VisibleForOnlyMe
data.value: Currently, {0} is only visible for you.

data.name: VisibleForUsers
data.value: Currently, {0} is only visible for the users {1}.

data.name: VisibleForUsergroups
data.value: Currently, {0} is only visible for the user groups {1}.

data.name: MissingSpellcheckerDictionary
data.value: A new index and dictionary have to be created. Only an administrator is able to do this, please contact one.

data.name: SiteThemeDesc
data.value: Change the application theme to alter the look and feel of the application.

data.name: TypeNameToFindContacts
data.value: Type the name of a contact.

data.name: AddTagsOneAtATime
data.value: Add tags one at a time

data.name: AllSearchedItemsAreSelectedWarning
data.value: Warning: All of the search results are selected.

data.name: SelectWhole
data.value: Select all from the search results

data.name: MoreSearchResults
data.value: Displaying {0} search results for '{1}'. Please enter more characters to help us find the entry you are looking for.

data.name: SelectCompanyToShowAddressInformation
data.value: Address information is displayed after selecting a company.

data.name: MarkMultipleNotificationsToChangeStatus
data.value: Mark multiple notifications to change the status.

data.name: M_QualityPlanCanNotBeDeleted
data.value: Quality plan can not be deleted. It is used in following tables: {0}

data.name: M_QualityTaskCanNotBeDeleted
data.value: Quality task can not be deleted. It is used in following tables: {0}

data.name: ChooseAColorSchemeDesc
data.value: Bring on some color by choosing one of the color schemes below. Whatever you select here will be the same for all users.

data.name: ProfilingInfo
data.value: Profiling allows you to analyze user behaviour and site performance.

data.name: ProfilingInfoStart
data.value: Click "Start" to initiate a new profiling session.

data.name: ProfilingInfoStop
data.value: Click "Stop" to terminate the current profiling session.

data.name: ConfirmDeleteSessionMessage
GeneralServiceContractInfo1
data.value: Use service contracts to document conditions for service features. With service contracts you can manage maintenance plans, budgets, material costs and services.

data.name: GeneralServiceContractInfo2
data.value: Use service contracts to manage service level agreements like reaction time, time to complete or office hours.

data.name: SearchCriteriaYieldedNoResults
data.value: Your search criteria yielded no results.

data.name: MaxLengthReached
data.value: The maximum number of characters reached.

data.name: BudgetSpareParts
data.value: Budget for spare parts up to

data.name: DatabaseMigrationPending
data.value: The database needs to be migrated: Current version {0}, available version {1}.

data.name: SiteHostNotSet
data.value: The Site Host is not set.

data.name: SetSitePropertiesDesc
data.value: You can change the display name and host of the site.

data.name: NoServiceContractInstallationsInfo
data.value: Manage your {Installations} here for which the conditions specified in the service contract should be applied. If no {Installations} are chosen, the contract will contain all the {Installations} of the customer.

data.name: NoServiceContractMaintenancePlansInfo
data.value: For this service contract no maintenance plans have been created yet.

data.name: StatusChangedForXItems
data.value: The status has been changed for {0} items.

data.name: ErrorWhileProcessingRequest
data.value: Sorry, an error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: LoginAsDifferentUser
data.value: Log in as a different user

data.name: DocumentsEmptySlateDescription
data.value: There are no documents attached to this entity. You can add documents like images, PDF-files or excel sheets to add extra information or clarify issues. These documents can be downloaded and viewed by every user with access to this entity.

data.name: SaveExpenseReportHint
data.value: Please note that you can not edit the expenses anymore after you send them.

data.name: SaveTimeEntryReportHint
data.value: Please note that you can not edit the time entries anymore after you send them.

data.name: SaveReportMailHint
data.value: You will receive a copy of the report to your E-mail address "{0}".

data.name: NoAccessToAppDataFolder
data.value: Can not access app data folder.

data.name: TagEmptySlate
data.value: Currently there are no tags available. When you start creating tags on a detail page you will see the list of tags here and they can be used for filtering.

data.name: ConfirmDeleteItemMessage
data.value: Do you really want to delete this item?

data.name: NotAllowedToCloseReplenishmentOrder
data.value: You are not allowed to close this replenishment order.

data.name: NotAllowedToSentReplenishmentOrder
data.value: You are not allowed to sent this replenishment order.

data.name: ReplenishmentOrderAlreadyClosed
data.value: This replenishment order has already been closed. Please reload the page.

data.name: ReplenishmentOrderDoesNotExist
data.value: This replenishment order does not exist.

data.name: ReplenishmentOrderSentTo
data.value: The replenishment order was sent to the following recipients: {0}

data.name: ReplenishmentOrderHasNoItems
data.value: The replenishment order has no items.

data.name: ReplenishmentOrderIsNotClosed
data.value: The replenishment order is not closed yet.

data.name: ConfirmDeleteTagMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the tag "[[Tag]]" ?

data.name: ConfirmSetServiceContractActive
data.value: Do you really want to set this service contract to "Active"?

data.name: ConfirmSetServiceContractInactive
data.value: Do you really want to set this service contract to "Inactive"?

data.name: RuleViolation.DurationAndFromToDoNotMatch
data.value: Duration does not match with From and To

data.name: SkillsEmptySlateDescription
data.value: If there are special skills required to process the order, you can enter them here. The skills can be used for planning employees at the planning board.

data.name: MaterialEmptySlateDescription
data.value: Material/Cost in the service order is used to pass known material/cost requirements (eg spare parts) to the technician. In addition, the material/cost used by service technicians can be viewed and managed after the feedback.

data.name: TimesEmptySlateDescription
data.value: Service times are used to document the spent hours on the order. Servic times are usually entered only by the technician in the field. Should services such as internal analysis or training be cleared, they can also be entered.

data.name: SearchFieldsDescription1
data.value: You can also search for specific values of the fields:

data.name: SearchFieldsDescription3
data.value: e. g.: "sometext AND Contact:CompanyB AND User:peter.peterson AND Date:*.1?.2011*" to search for all notes containing the text "sometext" that the user peter.peterson wrote during the fourth quarter of 2011 relating to company CompanyB.

data.name: SearchPrefixDescription1
data.value: You can also put a "+" or a "-" in front of a search term.

data.name: SearchPrefixDescription2
data.value: If there's a "+" in front, only results containing this search term will be displayed.

data.name: SearchPrefixDescription3
data.value: If there's a "-" in front, only results not containing this search term will be displayed,

data.name: SearchPrefixDescription4
data.value: e. g.: "Word1 Word2 +Word3 -Word4" to search for notes containing "Word3" but not containing "Word4". "Word1" und "Word2" can be contained, but don't have to.

data.name: NoLastReplenishmentOrders
data.value: You have no closed replenishment orders yet.

data.name: WhatAreReplenishmentOrders
data.value: With replenishment orders you are able to track materials that need back ordering to restock your inventory.

data.name: ThereAreNoExpenses
data.value: There are no expense entries, yet.

data.name: ThereAreNoTimeEntries
data.value: There are no time entries, yet.

data.name: FutureReportCanNotBeClosed
data.value: Only reports up to the current calendar week can be closed.

data.name: NoTimesReported
data.value: There are no reported times, yet.

data.name: NoMaterialsUsed
data.value: There are no used materials, yet.

data.name: NoServiceOders
data.value: There are no service orders which you're responsible for.

data.name: NoRecentContacts
data.value: You have to open a contact first before you can see it in this list.

data.name: TokenRequired
data.value: A token is required to use this feature. You can generate a token on the "My Infos" page.

data.name: VcfFileNeeded
data.value: Invalid file format. The imported file needs to be in the .vcf-format.

data.name: VisibleForUser
data.value: Currently, {0} is only visible for the user {1}.

data.name: VisibleForUsergroup
data.value: Currently, {0} is only visible for the user group {1}.

data.name: RequestFailureTryAgainLater
data.value: There was a problem with the request. Please try again later.

data.name: NoActiveUsersInRoleTechnician
data.value: No dispatch can be created since there is no active user in role {0}.

data.name: EntityDeletionDenied
data.value: Entity is in use and can not be deleted.

data.name: LookupDeletionDenied
data.value: Lookup is in use and can not be deleted.

data.name: NoCustomerForServiceOrder
data.value: There is no customer for this service order.

data.name: RuleViolation.CustomRecipientIsEmpty
data.value: You didn't entered a custom recipient.

data.name: MaintenancePlanHintChangingIntervalRequiresNewStartDate
data.value: Hint: Changing the maintenance interval requires setting a new first date.

data.name: SetReportSettingsDesc
data.value: You can set a logo for the report header, as well as a custom text for the report footer.

data.name: Error_InternalServerError
data.value: An error occured with your request. Please try again. If the error persists, please contact the system administrator.

data.name: CompleteTaskConfirmation
data.value: Do you really want to complete the task '{0}'?

data.name: SelectPersonOrEnterCustomEmail
data.value: Please select a person or enter a E-mail address.

data.name: EnterCustomName
data.value: Click here to enter a custom name.

data.name: EnterCustomEmail
data.value: Click here to enter a custom E-mail address.

data.name: PersonNotInList
data.value: If the desired person is not in the list, you can add a new one.

data.name: ConfirmDeleteRelationship
data.value: Do you really want to delete this relationship?

data.name: NoRelationshipsInfo
data.value: Here you can manage relationships (e. g. customer, supplier, partner, etc.) between entities. Currently there are no relationships. Click the action "Create business relationship" to create a new relationship.

data.name: PositionNotAvailable
data.value: The position of this person is not available.

data.name: MoreSearchResultsOf
data.value: Displaying {0} of {1} search results for '{2}'. Please enter more characters to help us find the entry you are looking for.

data.name: MakeStandardAddressConfirmationMessage
data.value: Do you really want to make this address the standard address?

data.name: ConfirmDeleteEntity
data.value: Do you really want to delete {0}?

data.name: ConfirmSetEntityInactive
data.value: Do you really want to set {0} inactive?

data.name: ConfirmSetEntityActive
data.value: Do you really want to set {0} active again?

data.name: NotPossibleToSubmitChanges
data.value: Changes can not be made and saved as long as {0} is inactive.

data.name: ContentNotAvailableOffline
data.value: This content is not available while offline.

data.name: EmailWillBeNewLogin
data.value: You have to log in with your E-mail address in the future.

data.name: UpcomingTasksBody
data.value: You've got {0} tasks which are due today. There are {1} overdue tasks.

data.name: AutoGeneratedMail
data.value: This message was generated automatically, please do not reply.

data.name: ConfirmRequestLocalStorage
data.value: Do you really want the client {0} to send all localStorage data to the server?

data.name: ConfirmRequestLocalDatabase
data.value: Do you really want the client {0} to send all data in it's local database to the server?

data.name: StatusChangeNotAuthorized
data.value: You need to be the responsible contact for the project or have a special permission to change a closed project's status.

data.name: NoProjectsMatchingSearchCriteria
data.value: No search results were found matching the given search criteria.

data.name: MergePersonExplanation
data.value:
You've selected "{0}" as the "loser" for the merge.
All notes, tags, tasks, etc. attached to this person will be moved to the "winner" of the merge. Afterwards, the "loser" will be deleted.

For this purpose choose the person you want to keep (the "winner"). You can only choose on person at a time. If you'd like to merge more than two persons together, just go through the merge process again after the merge you are performing now is done.

data.name: MergeCompanyExplanation
data.value:
You've selected "{0}" as the "loser" for the merge.
All notes, tags, staff, addresses, tasks, etc. attached to this company will be moved to the "winner" of the merge. Afterwards, the "loser" will be deleted.

For this purpose choose the company you want to keep (the "winner"). You can only choose on company at a time. If you'd like to merge more than two companies together, just go through the merge process again after the merge you are performing now is done.

data.name: RuleViolation.MergeWinnerEmpty
data.value: Please select a winner for the merge.

data.name: CompanyEditExtensionsOnlyInfo
data.value: It's only possible to edit the extended Information, because the company was imported from the ERP-system.

data.name: SynchronizationNotCompleteWarning
data.value: Attention: Not all entered data was synchronized to the server.

data.name: DeleteTopicConfirmation
data.value: Do you really want to delete this topic?

data.name: AnErrorOccuredCreatingAnInvoice
data.value: An error occured creating an invoice {1}.

data.name: M_FileApiNotSupported
data.value: The file APIs are not fully supported in this browser.

data.name: M_SelectedFileNotImage
data.value: The selected file is not an image. Please choose a picture.

data.name: M_SelectedFileTooLarge
data.value: One or more of the selected file is too large.

data.name: EmailSentVisibilityOf
data.value: An E-mail was sent to request the visibility of {0} {1}.

data.name: DefeatedVisibilityRequest
data.value: You defeated the request for visibility of {1}.

data.name: AcceptedVisibilityRequest
data.value: You accepted the request for visibility of {1}.

data.name: ClickButtonToGrantVisibility
data.value: If you want to grant visibility, please click on the following button:

data.name: RequestVisibilityAccepted
data.value: Your request for visibility of {0} in {1} was accepted.

data.name: RequestVisibilityRejected
data.value: Your request for visibility of {0} in {1} was rejected.

data.name: DoNotReply
data.value: Please don't reply to this E-mail. It was automatically generated by {0}.

data.name: EmailSentFrom
data.value: This E-mail is being sent from: {0}.

data.name: ClickToLogin
data.value: You are not logged in. Click {0} to log in.

data.name: AccessVisibilityForObject
data.value: Accept visibility of object in CRM system.

data.name: RejectVisibilityForObject
data.value: Reject visibility of object in CRM system.

data.name: Error_InvalidVisibilityRequestId
data.value: The request of visibility could not be processed.

data.name: AppSuggestion
data.value: For the best L-mobile experience please use the L-mobile app.

data.name: PersonsEmptyState
data.value: No persons found for this contact.

data.name: YouAreHereWithinXMeters
data.value: You are within {0} meters from this point.

data.name: BackgroundInformationEmptyState
data.value: No background information have been added yet.

data.name: MaterialClientOnlineLoginDescription
data.value: Access to all functionalities, depending on user permissions

data.name: MaterialClientOfflineLoginDescription
data.value: Functions and data limited to the essentials for the field worker

data.name: NotFoundMessage
data.value: Sorry, but the page you're looking for can not be found.

data.name: ReallyDelete?
data.value: Do you really want to delete "{0}"?

data.name: CopyNotSupported
data.value: Auto copy not suported by your browser, please copy highlighted text with "Ctrl + C" command.

data.name: CouldNotDeleteAddress
data.value: Could not delete address, because it is still referenced:

data.name: CompanyIsSubsidiary
data.value: This company already is a subsidiary of the current company.

data.name: CompanyIsCurrentCompany
data.value: This company is the current company.

data.name: SubsidiaryAlreadyHasParent
data.value: This company already has a parent company.

data.name: SubsidiaryIsCurrentParent
data.value: This company is the parent company of the current company.

data.name: RuleViolation.CompanyIsCurrentCompany
data.value: This company is the current company.

data.name: NoRelationshipInfo
data.value: To keep relationships up to date you are at the right place.

data.name: ConfirmDeleteBravo
data.value: Are you sure you'd like to delete this BRAVO?

data.name: AcceptPrivacyPolicy
data.value: I have read, understood and accept the attached Data Privacy Policy

data.name: PleaseAcceptDataPrivacyPolicy
data.value: Please indicate that you have read and agree to the Data Privacy Policy

data.name: DataProtectionDescription
data.value: {0} attaches great importance to the protection and security of your personal data. It is therefore important for us to inform you which personal data we collect in order to carry out our assembly work, how we use this data and what rights you have with regard to your data.

data.name: DP_Main2Title
data.value: How are my personal data secured against unauthorized access and loss?

data.name: DP_Main3Title
data.value: Rights of data subjects and the right of appeal

data.name: DP_Main4Title
data.value: Who is the contact person for data protection issues and how can I get in touch?

data.name: DP_Main1Paragraph1Title
data.value: Who is responsible for processing my personal data?

data.name: DP_Main1Paragraph2Title
data.value: What personal data do we collect, for what purposes and on what legal basis?

data.name: DP_Main1Paragraph3Title
data.value: What are the consequences of not providing personal data?

data.name: DP_Main1Paragraph4Title
data.value: To whom and for what purposes do we transfer your personal data?

data.name: DP_Main1Paragraph5Title
data.value: Will my personal data be processed outside of the European Union?

data.name: DP_Main1Paragraph1
data.value: The body responsible for processing your personal data is {0}.

data.name: DP_Main1Paragraph2
data.value: You are required to provide the following data: Name, address, means of communication (telephone, fax, E-mail or mobile phone). In addition, the work carried out, time sheets, equipment and usage information are recorded in the installation report. We collect the aforementioned personal data to fulfill the order you have placed. The legal basis for this is Article 6 Paragraph 1 Clause 1 littera b of the General Data Protection Regulation. In addition, we use the aforementioned personal data for quality assurance, in particular to provide you with the necessary service information about your device. The legal basis for this is Article 6 Paragraph 1 Clause 1 littera f of the General Data Protection Regulation.

data.name: DP_Main1Paragraph3
data.value: Without the provision of the personal data, it is not possible for us to carry out the order. Your personal data are required for the conclusion of the contract.

data.name: DP_Main1Paragraph4
data.value: We only pass on your personal data to third parties if and insofar as it is necessary to carry out the contractual relationships with you or to enforce our claims, if you have consented to the disclosure, if we are legally obliged either by court order or to respond to the inquiries from official bodies, in particular law enforcement and supervisory authorities, if and to the extent that this is necessary to avert threats to public safety and order and to prosecute criminal offenses.

data.name: DP_Main1Paragraph5
data.value: Your personal data will not be processed outside of the European Union.

data.name: DP_Main2
data.value: We use technical and organizational security measures to ensure that the personal data of our users are protected from loss, incorrect changes or unauthorized access by third parties. In any case, only authorized persons have access to your personal data from our side, and only to the extent that it is necessary for the purposes mentioned above. The transmission of all data is encrypted.

data.name: DP_Main3
data.value: You have the right to (i) information about your data, (ii) correction of incorrect data and completion of incomplete data (iii) deletion of your data, in particular if it is no longer necessary for the above-mentioned purpose, your data has been processed unlawfully or you have objected to the processing and there are no overriding legitimate reasons for the processing, (iv) restriction of the processing of your data, in particular if the accuracy of the data is disputed by you or the processing of your data is unlawful and you prefer the restriction of the data use instead of its deletion, (v) and the right to receive your data in a structured, common and machine-readable format and to transfer your data to another person responsible. In addition, you have the right to file a complaint with the competent supervisory authority.

data.name: DP_Main4
data.value: If you have any questions about data protection, please contact our data protection officer:

data.name: ConfirmActivateBravo
data.value: Are you sure you'd like to activate this bravo?

data.name: ConfirmDeactivateBravo
data.value: Are you sure you'd like to deactivate this bravo?

data.name: CompanyEmptySlate
data.value: No companies were found matching the given search criteria.

data.name: AdAuthRegisterNotSupported
data.value: Active Directory authentication is active. Register user is not supported for AD provider.

data.name: AdAuthPasswordChangeNotSupported
data.value: Active Directory authentication is active. Change password is not supported for AD provider.

data.name: PersonEmptySlate
data.value: No persons were found matching the given search criteria.

data.name: ChangeEmailAddressRequiresPasswordResetWarning
data.value: After changing the E-mail address the password needs to be resetted.

data.name: SelectContactType
data.value: Please select the contact type you're looking for.

data.name: RuleViolation.NotVisibleToCurrentUser
data.value: The selected visibility limitation prevents a continued access to this part

data.name: CompleteTasksConfirmation
data.value: Do you really want to complete the tasks?

data.name: TaskEmptySlate
data.value: No tasks found by the given criteria

data.name: EmptyLookupEditorSlate
data.value: Please select a lookup from the right side to edit.

data.name: DeleteLogsConfirmation
data.value: Do you want to delete the selected logs?

data.name: ConfirmActivateUser
data.value: Do you really want to activate the user: {0}?

data.name: ConfirmDeactivateUser
data.value: Do you really want to deactivate the user: {0}?

data.name: SkillAssignSuccess
data.value: User(s) successfully assigned to the Skill: {0}

data.name: RoleAssignSuccess
data.value: User(s) successfully assigned to the Role: {0}

data.name: BindingError
data.value: Application error: It was not possible to bind the data to the UI.

data.name: This information is visible for everybody.
data.value: This information is visible for everybody."

data.name: UnsavedChangesConfirmationMessage
data.value: You have unsaved changes on this page

data.name: SkipTransactionsMsg
data.value: Skipping postings means you will loose the data that is contained inside the postings itself. Are you really sure you want to do this?

data.name: PostingsEmptyState
data.value: No postings found for this transaction.

data.name: NoPostingsOfflineMsg
data.value: Postings service is not available in offline mode

data.name: TagCreationNotAuthorized
data.value: It was not possible to add the tag. Probably you're not authorized to do so.

data.name: UserRoleEmptySlate
data.value: No user roles were found matching the given search criteria.

data.name: DomainEmptySlate
data.value: No domains were found matching the given search criteria.

data.name: InvalidEmailCharacters
data.value: The E-mail address provided contains an invalid character.

data.name: MissingLookup
data.value: There is no {0} lookup defined. Please contact your system administrator.

data.name: RuleViolation.NewPasswordIsTheSameAsOldPassword
data.value: New password cannot be the same as the old one

data.name: DropFiles
data.value: Drop files here or click to upload

data.name: MaxFilesExceededError
data.value: The maximum number of uploadable files has been exceeded.

data.name: GenericError
data.value: An error occurred, please check the log

data.name: InvalidUsernameCharacters
data.value: The user name contains invalid characters.

data.name: ConfirmDeleteTag
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this tag? Doing so will remove the tag from all entities as well.

data.name: LicensingAlert
data.value: Your license will expire within {0} days. Make sure to renew it, or the application will not be usable after the license expired.

data.name: RuleViolation.AccountNotLicensed
data.value: You need a licence to log in, please contact your administrator.

data.name: AssignLicenseToUsers
data.value: Are you sure you want to assign licenses to the following user(s)?

data.name: RevokeLicenseFromUsers
data.value: Are you sure you want to revoke licenses from the following user(s)?

data.name: NotEnoughLicenseError
data.value: Can not assign {0} user license(s), because only {1} unassigned license(s) left.

data.name: NoTenantAvailable
data.value: No tenant available for this user.

data.name: EmailAttachmentAppendix
NoClientAvailable
data.value: No client available for this user. Please contact your system administrator.

data.name: DropFile
data.value: Drop file here or click to upload

data.name: CouldNotAssignRoleInsufficientLicense
data.value: Could not assign {0} role to user due to insufficient license count.

data.name: RuleViolation.CouldNotActivateUserBecauseRoleInsufficientLicense
data.value: User activation failed, because there are roles with insufficient license count.

data.name: AssetsEmptyState
data.value: No user resources assigned to this user

data.name: SkillExpirationNoteText
AssetExpirationNoteText
data.value: The following User's user resources are expiring: User – User resource – Date {0}

data.name: TechnicianHasNoneOfTheRequiredOrderSkills
data.value: {0} has none of the skills required for this order ({1}).

data.name: TechnicianLacksSomeOfRequiredOrderSkills
data.value: {0} doesn't have some of the skills required for this order ({1}).

data.name: TechnicianHasNoneOfTheRequiredOrderAssets
data.value: {0} has none of the user resources required for this order ({1}).

data.name: TechnicianLacksSomeOfRequiredOrderAssets
data.value: {0} doesn't have some of the user resources required for this order ({1}).

data.name: BarcodeRootHyphenSelectionHint
BarcodeFormatLengthInfo
data.value: The maximum number of characters for the formats is as follows:

data.name: BarcodeFailedRender
data.value: The barcode could not be displayed. The value may be too long or contains invalid characters.

data.name: UpcomingTasksGroupBody
data.value: You've got {0} tasks which are due today and {1} overdue tasks in the {2} usergroup.

data.name: InconsistentNumberCreationSettingWarning
data.value: Creation is not possible due to the current {0} creation settings.

data.name: AdNameMissingListAlert
data.value: Active Directory name is missing from {0} active users. You cannot edit them until you set AD name.

data.name: AdNameMissingAlert
data.value: Active directory authentication is active but AD identifier is not set for this user. You cannot edit it until you configure it.

data.name: MultiFactorAuthenticationSetAsMandatory
data.value: Multi-factor authentication has been successfully set as mandatory.

data.name: MultiFactorAuthenticationNoLongerMandatory
data.value: Multi-factor authentication is no longer mandatory.

data.name: CheckYourAuthenticatorAppToScanQr
data.value: Check your authenticator app to scan QR code

data.name: AuthorizationKeyCopied
data.value: Authorization key has been copied to the clipboard

data.name: TotpAuthenticationSuccessfullySetUp
data.value: The TOTP authenticator has been successfully set up.

data.name: TotpAuthenticationSuccessfullyRemoved
data.value: The TOTP authenticator has been successfully removed.

data.name: ConfirmTotpAuthenticationRemove
data.value: Do you really want to remove the current authenticator?

data.name: HttpPreconditionFailedError
data.value: The data is no longer up-to-date. Please refresh the page.

data.name: RequestedViewIsTheCurrent
data.value: The requested view is the current one.

data.name: RetryTransactionsConfirmationQuestion
data.value: Are you sure you want to retry processing these transactions?

data.name: DropBoxEmptySlate
data.value: No dropbox E-mail address found for this project

data.name: EmptyFileIosHint
data.value: Tip: On iOS devices, changing the file upload option from 'automatic' to 'current' may resolve the issue.

data.name: EmptyFileCannotBeUploaded
data.value: A file with 0 KB size cannot be uploaded. Please remove it.

data.name: SomethingWentWrong
data.value: Something went wrong. if the issue persist please contact L-Mobile support

data.name: CreateTagPermissionMissing
data.value: You don’t have permission to create new tags.
